title.text: Why Choose Bankai for OCI Cloud

sections.subTitleText: Our 21-point managed service suite supports Oracle Cloud operations with 24/7 monitoring, DR readiness, cybersecurity, and multi-environment control.

data.title: EasyBankCore® Browser-based CBS Software Deployment at Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) - Primary & Disaster Recovery Data Centre for Head office and Branches. EasyBankCore® CBS Patch management & versioning synchronization on-going basis.
Implementing Hosted Infrastructure on VPS at Primary & Disaster Recovery Data Centre with logical security including IaaS & PaaS.
Primary, UAT, Disaster Recovery Data Centre: OS, Database, Application/Web Server Installation, Patching, Versioning @ OCI.
Managing / Monitoring Replication Link between Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) – Primary & Disaster Recovery Data Centre.
Failover Management: Unplanned Outage of Primary Data Centre.

LIVE DR Operations (Planned – whenever Bank gets connected with Disaster Recovery Data Centre, All Digital Channels will be (ENABLED) available to bank & Bank's Primary/Secondary Connectivity will be used to connect to DRS for Core Banking Operations.)
Data Replication with Recovery Point Objective (RPO) & Recovery Time Objective SLAs.
Secured Block Chain Table Implementation for Audit Trail Log Tables
Pro-Active Email Alerts & Server Resource Utilization Logs to Organization’s IT team.

journeyCards.title: Oracle DB migration to same/higher version
